# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

- apiVersion: authentication.istio.io/v1beta1
  kind: RequestAuthentication
  metadata:
    name: jwt-auth
    namespace: default
  spec:
    # Configure jwks to fetch keys from https://test.insecure.id/jwks.json and extract issuer from Authorization header to validate incoming tokens 
    jwks:
      source:
        kubernetesRef:
          apiVersion: v1
          kind: ServiceAccount
          name: istio-ingressgateway-service-account
          namespace: istio-system
    # Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers  
    rules: 
      - selector: 
          matchLabels:
            app: api-auth
        from:
        - source: 
            requestPrincipals:
              - '*'
        values:
          claim_name1: 'jwt.claims'
          issuer: 'https://test.insecure.id'
